privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: CardioWeb stores your account and workout information to provide progress tracking, personalized recommendations, and a better training experience.
privacy.p2: We do not sell your personal data. Data is processed only for core app features and platform security.
privacy.p3: If you want your account data removed, contact support and include your account email.

support.title: Support
support.p1: Need help with login, progress, or workout data? Reach out and we will respond as soon as possible.
support.p3: When reporting an issue, include a short description and screenshots if possible.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.p1: CardioWeb is provided for educational and fitness-tracking use. It is not a medical service.
terms.p2: You are responsible for using workouts safely and within your physical limits.
terms.p3: By using the app, you agree to these terms and to our privacy policy.
